problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
